subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of God's love, and yearning for that Face whereby the Kingdom of earth and heaven hath been illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استانس بنار محبت الله واشوقا لوجه استضاء به ملکوت الارض و السموات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @pain of love; love as veil, @Imam Husayn, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God
